name: AWP | 无畏战神
descriptionEn: High risk and high reward, the infamous AWP is recognizable by its signature report and one-shot, one-kill policy. It has been given a base coat of blue metallic paint then hand-painted with metallic gold swirls and accents. Turn some heads before you take them off
descriptionZh: 高风险，高回报，恶名昭彰的 AWP 因其标志性的枪声和一枪一个的准则而为人熟知。 这把武器以蓝色金属为外表，然后手绘了金色的漩涡形花纹。 欲将其爆头，必先使其伸头
